final:
// // This module implements a 16-bit SRAM with read and write functionality. The data input is stored in the memory when the write enable signal is deasserted.
module sram_16bit (
    input wire [15:0] data_in,
    input wire [3:0] address,
    input wire write_enable,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] memory [0:15]; // 16x16-bit memory

    always @(*) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            memory[address] <= data_in; // Write data to memory
        end
        data_out = memory[address]; // Read data from memory
    end
endmodule
